title: Minecraft Optimus
description: A modpack that purely optimizes Minecraft Java to run the best it can be, for versions 1.20.1 and 1.21.4, with little to no visual or gameplay changes!
body:
A modpack that purely optimizes Minecraft Java to run the best it can be, for versions 1.20.1 and up, with little to no visual or gameplay changes!

The goal here is to improve how Minecraft runs as much as possible, while making near-zero changes to gameplay or visuals.

All contributions and suggestions are welcome. Join the Discord server link!

# UPDATES:
- Now updated to 1.0.7:
  - Java 1.20.1 for Forge, NeoForge and Fabric
  - Java 1.21.4 for NeoForge, Fabric and Quilt!
- Better Beds Reforged has been removed in all versions that contain EnlightenedBlockEntities or EnhancedBlockEntities as it conflicts with those mods, [causing beds to render incorrectly](https://github.com/TeamMidnightDust/BetterBeds/issues/19).
- VanillaIcecreamFix has been updated and is now compatible with Applied Energistics 2, and you are now free to add AE2 to any instance of Minecraft Optimus of version 1.0.3 or later.

## Coming soon:
- versions for Java 1.21.6 will be released as soon as the mods involved are updated. This will then supercede the Java 1.21.4 versions.

## Known incompatibilites:
- Palladium causes Create-mod connected textures to malfunction. Disable Palladium if using this modpack with any Create mods.
